text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has suffered an injury, so I've
brought her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sorry for causing so much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The worst of the pain is gone. I think I'll be
fine with some rest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If I had only been more careful...
choice_data_list: Just focus on getting some rest right now.
Just focus on getting some rest right now.
Get better soon so we can get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If I had only been more careful...
choice_data_list: Just focus on getting some rest right now.
Just focus on getting some rest right now.
Get better soon so we can get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But my poor legs will be so bored...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I already miss the feeling of the turf under my feet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, I have a proposition. I've heard that light
exercise is useful for recovery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I could do a little light jogging to
help my rehabilitation?
choice_data_list: As long as you don't overdo it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll be careful. I'll make sure to go slow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's still a while to go before I'm feeling 100%.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By attempting to jog while undergoing
rehabilitation, Silence Suzuka has disrupted her
recovery process, lengthening the necessary
treatment period.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm starting to feel a lot better.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I might be able to return to my training soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that jogging has helped to speed up
Silence Suzuka's recovery.
